en_title: Mystic-History of the Sacred Dragon of the Việt People
en_body:
.................................................................
(lovingly dedicated to Poet-Friend Hoài Nam and
those sacred dragons of the Việt People who are
ourselves)
.................................................................



stone stirs mud slick-shining rain-smoothed
mirrors càn-khôn—the sun-moon faces turning
an islet, one tuft hung at the head
the dragon coils and winds all year to spring Life forth
land of four spheres—the chanting song is plucked
entwining human passions, worldly ways below
stone upon stone wrings out a bead of dew
tapered nipple of stalactite—round mouth sucking breath
born into mud, earth, vermilion stone
body flung across, tail striking—kingdoms fall
lashes round and full the face of Infinity
bursts Darkness open, reaching to the Uttermost above.

..................................................................
(Houston, TX, USA: 1980)

MYSTIC-HISTORY OF THE SACRED DRAGON OF THE VIỆT PEOPLE
note: The sacred dragon evokes the Vietnamese ancestral myth of the Dragon Lord Lạc Long Quân and the origins of the Việt people.
